另外有興趣想留自己Research Info既巴絲, 希望可以搵到同field既巴打傾下計或者睇下有無potential collaboration, 可以係下面個google doc填自己既資料(optional)
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1VAW9av9mt3RnUiYU7t8NhV73P7hc5mTZc1rRccket00/edit?usp=sharing

如果你想分享下報pg經驗，或者知多啲關於報pg嘅嘢，可以入去呢個word：
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1-6RuzKFOdboyqvHGpUcDhZpLz833E2m8jEi3FJfnUCI/edit

有興趣係academic 發展，做research既巴絲入黎傾下啦

精選Papers:

Phy :https://journals.aps.org/rmp/abstract/10.1103/RevModPhys.87.981
http://www.phys.sinica.edu.tw/~nano/article/e-04.pdf
Maths: https://www.jstor.org/stable/1969529?seq=1#page_scan_tab_contents
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC1063129
https://arxiv.org/abs/1704.07210
Econ: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Ariel_Rubinstein2/publication/4719889_The_Electronic_Mail_Game_Strategic_Behavior_Under_Almost_Common_Knowledge/links/004635309c7e0b6a58000000.pdf
CS/EE: http://statweb.stanford.edu/~candes/papers/StableRecovery.pdf
http://math.harvard.edu/~ctm/home/text/others/shannon/entropy/entropy.pdf
Bio: http://www.nature.com/nbt/journal/v34/n1/full/nbt.3439.html?foxtrotcallback=true
Psychology:
http://journals.sagepub.com/doi/abs/10.1177/0956797611417632

歡迎大家繼續擴充

Hi I am new. I am Wilson. PSYC+GEOG double major, year 4. Started doing research way too late. Now 3 research interns at the same time, not sure if its a good idea haha. need to defer one sem

Interested in game / play research, particularly poker (game theory, decision making, cognitive biases, representativeness biases, reasoning, statistical thinking gor d; and education implications), and environmental psychology (GEOG+PSYC) (e.g. pro-environment behaviour), built (e.g. city planning) and natural (e.g. nature play) environment and child development; and psych tech products (e.g. AI, psyc app development, gao gun or gaoed some apps for prof and startup before)

Anyone similar research interest? wanna learn more
